title: Ordivon Controlled Claim Vocabulary
description: Every status word used in Ordivon receipts and documents must map to a machine-verifiable condition. Words without verifiable truth conditions are FORBIDDEN in governance contexts. This prevents the 'overclaim' class of error identified in CI-SelfCalibration.

READY.condition: All selected checks pass (ordivon-verify returns exit 0)

BLOCKED.condition: One or more hard failures exist (ordivon-verify returns exit 1)

OPEN.condition: Debt or lesson has status=OPEN with review trigger

CLOSED.condition: Debt has status=CLOSED with resolution evidence

VERIFIED.condition: Receipt + evidence + scope boundary all present

forbidden_words.description: These words have no machine-verifiable truth condition in Ordivon. Using them in a receipt, claim, or governance document is an overclaim pattern that CI must flag.

exceptions.description: Contexts where forbidden words are legitimate
patterns: 在引用中（如文档标题包含这些词）
在代码注释或技术描述中（非 governance claim）
在外部引用或 benchmark 名称中
